name: Jacob Chaffin
summary: AI infrastructure engineer building agentic systems and LLM orchestration layers. 6+ years designing real-time streaming pipelines and multi-agent coordination. Expert in building autonomous AI agents that reason, plan, and execute complex workflows. Deep experience with RAG systems, vector databases, voice AI platforms, and production ML infrastructure across AWS/GCP with Kubernetes.

projects.name: Prosody.ai
projects.description: Prosody intelligence infrastructure for voice pipelines. SSM-based model (Mamba/S4D) runs parallel to ASR, streaming per-utterance emotion, VAD, and vertical-specific state. ConversationPredictor GRU for forward prediction (escalation risk, CSAT, churn, recommended tone). ProsodyCRM dashboard: API keys, transcript analysis, LoRA fine-tuning, Kafka orchestration. REST and WebSocket APIs, Python and JavaScript SDKs, sub-200ms p99.

projects.name: Sparke
projects.description: Mobile tutoring app with a LiveKit-powered talking avatar. LLM orchestration with RAG, Twilio telephony, and Kafka-driven ELO feedback.

projects.name: AureliaStudio.AI
projects.description: AI content studio with LangGraph multi-agent orchestration, Apollo GraphQL over DynamoDB, and LiveKit real-time sessions on Kubernetes.

projects.name: Realtime Metrics Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time voice AI analytics dashboard. KPI scoring with Pinecone, latency monitoring, and Pipecat Cloud call orchestration.

experience.description: Built prosody intelligence infrastructure for voice pipelines: an SSM-based model (Mamba/S4D) that runs parallel to ASR and streams per-utterance emotion, VAD, and vertical-specific state. Designed and deployed 32-dim prosodic feature extraction, multi-head output (emotion softmax, VAD regression, vertical state mapping), and a causal GRU (ConversationPredictor) for forward prediction of escalation risk, CSAT, churn, and recommended tone. Built ProsodyCRM management plane: API keys, transcript analysis, outcome feedback loop, LoRA fine-tuning on GCP, Kafka event orchestration. REST and WebSocket APIs, Python and JavaScript SDKs; sub-200ms p99, horizontal scaling.

Built a mobile tutoring app with a talking avatar powered by a LiveKit agent that ingests live audio, video, and screen-sharing tracks. Implemented backend LLM orchestration with material-level RAG, telephony, Twilio and CallKeep integration, and a Kafka-driven ELO feedback loop for study-plan progression, with authentication and token services hosted on GCP.

Developed modular UI components and dynamic pages for agent-assist tools using Next.js, React, and GraphQL, integrating live ASR and voice analytics. Engineered real-time sentiment visualization layers with phonetic and lexical embeddings for enhanced client-side rendering. Streamlined SSR/ISR logic for data-heavy voice sessions, improving initial load times by 35%. Modernized analytics pipelines to support LLM-driven conversational interfaces, implementing deep tone-aware inference. Built internal analytics tools with NumPy, Pandas, Jupyter, and Python for behavioral insights.

Developed and optimized neural networks for audio and vision classification using PyTorch. Built and deployed machine learning models utilizing TensorFlow, enhancing model accuracy through extensive data analysis. Created full-stack applications for administrative login and data transfer with Node.js and React, integrating GraphQL for efficient data querying. Designed and maintained an interactive visualization tool for error tracing on Wave's proprietary DPU-based compiler. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to integrate AI solutions into products, researching cutting-edge techniques in natural language processing.
